_comment: EntraScope Scope Configuration - Fill in before running. Never commit this file to source control.

Authentication._comment_sp: If Method=ServicePrincipal, fill in ClientId and Secret of an App Registration with appropriate permissions

HoneypotAccounts._comment: Dedicated test accounts ONLY - never real user accounts

TestAccount._comment: Low-privilege account for PrivEsc and lateral movement testing

TestServicePrincipal._comment: Optionally pre-created low-priv SP for OAuth tests

Options._comment_phases: All, or array of phase names: Phase1,Phase2,...Phase8

_comment_userlist: Optional path to a newline-delimited list of UPNs to test enumeration against. Leave blank to only test a few generated patterns.
